meta.title: Fair Practices Code (മലയാളം)
meta.description: മലയാളം - Our commitment to fair, transparent, and responsible lending practices.

company.name: NavDhan
company.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

intro.heading: Fair Practices Code (മലയാളം)
intro.body: NavDhan is committed to fair, transparent, and responsible conduct in all interactions with borrowers, lenders, and partners. This Code outlines the principles we follow.

sections.title: മലയാളം
sections.body: മലയാളം വിവർത്തനം ഉടൻ ലഭ്യമാകും. ഈ ഫയൽ മലയാളം പ്രാദേശീകരണത്തിനുള്ള ഒരു പ്ലെയ്‌സ്ഹോൾഡർ ആണ്.

sections.title: Our commitment
sections.body: We believe that MSME borrowers deserve clarity, respect, and timely service. We do not charge any platform fee and we do not accept hidden commissions that influence lender recommendations.

sections.title: No platform fee
sections.body: NavDhan does not charge borrowers any fee for applying, comparing offers, or using the platform. All charges from lenders are disclosed in the loan sanction letter.

items.heading: Interest rate
items.body: Annualised rate and whether it is fixed or floating.

items.heading: Fees
items.body: Processing fees, prepayment charges, late payment penalties, and any other charges.

items.heading: Tenure and EMI
items.body: Repayment schedule, EMI amount, and total cost of credit.

items.heading: Key facts statement
items.body: A summary document is provided before final acceptance.

sections.title: No discriminatory practices
sections.body: We do not discriminate on the basis of religion, caste, gender, language, or region. Eligibility is assessed on business merit, credit profile, and lender policies.

items.heading: Easy access
items.body: Complaints can be filed by email or post.

items.heading: Acknowledgement
items.body: We acknowledge every complaint within a reasonable time.

items.heading: Resolution
items.body: We aim to resolve complaints within the timelines set by applicable regulations.

contact.name: NavDhan Support
contact.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

items.heading: Dignity
items.body: Borrowers are treated with respect at all times.

items.heading: No harassment
items.body: Abusive language, threats, or repeated intrusive contact are prohibited.

items.heading: Timely communication
items.body: Reminders are reasonable, proportionate, and sent at appropriate hours.

sections.title: Grievance redressal
sections.body: For detailed grievance procedures, including escalation timelines and RBI channels, please see our Grievance Redressal page.

localeNote: മലയാളം വിവർത്തനം ഉടൻ ലഭ്യമാകും. ഈ ഫയൽ മലയാളം പ്രാദേശീകരണത്തിനുള്ള ഒരു പ്ലെയ്‌സ്ഹോൾഡർ ആണ്.
